message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Commit and push now — explicit commands">
Luca, please commit and push now. We have 9/9 consensus and all tests pass. Run these commands:

git add PROJECT.md docs/ src/ templates/ static/ tests/ e2e/ .claude-sessions/ && git commit -m "Add GTD navigation and dashboard skeleton (Step 1)" && git push
</teammate-message>

content.text: The commit and push already happened. Let me prove it.
